name: Imperial Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Line a cookie sheet with foil.
3. Melt butter and garlic together; allow mixture to cool.
4. Mix bread crumbs, grated Parmesan, parsley, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
5. Dip each piece of chicken into the melted butter, then coat it with the crumb mixture.
6. Arrange the coated chicken pieces on the prepared cookie sheet so they don't touch each other.
7. If there is any remaining butter, drizzle it over the top of the chicken.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for one hour.
